full_text:
Meng Ta (Bolang) 孟他 (伯郎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Ta (孟他), styledBolang (伯郎). Achieved infamy for bribing Zhang Rang for a post. Meng Ta was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
